card_description: Runciter is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 8 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Runciter. Context: "Dick formalizes the "Ham Sandwich" model of reality: Man - World - God."

linked_segments.summary: Dick develops a "womb" model of cosmogony: Level 1 (Holy Wisdom/Logos) creates Level 2 (Nature/Egg) to give birth to Level 3 (Sentient Replicant), which will eventually be absorbed back into Level 1.
linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_61.txt
